static compose(

  b: AttributeMap | undefined,
  keepNull: boolean,
): AttributeMap | undefined {
  if (typeof a !== 'object') {
    a = {};
  }
  if (typeof b !== 'object') {
    b = {};

  let attributes = Object.keys(b).reduce<AttributeMap>((copy, key) => {

    }, attributes);

}

static compose(
  a: AttributeMap | undefined,
  b: AttributeMap | undefined,
  keepNull: boolean,
): AttributeMap | undefined {
  if (typeof a !== 'object') {
    a = {};
  }
  if (typeof b !== 'object') {
    b = {};
  }
  let attributes = Object.keys(b).reduce<AttributeMap>((copy, key) => {
    if (b[key] !== undefined) {
      copy[key] = b[key];
    }
    return copy;
  }, {});
  if (keepNull) {

      return copy;
    }, attributes);

      }
      return copy;
    }, attributes);
  }

}
```
